ApiToken.label: Bing ApiToken
ApiToken.description: Your Bing API Token. API token generation is not generally available. To obtain one, you’ll need to contact Microsoft Support, or alternatively, you can [fill out this form](https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=v4j5cvGGr0GRqy180BHbRwMZAe0PcMxHmZ0AjDaNRmxUM0o5UURRVktCRkxHNEFLTVNYQjI3NDNBUS4u) to request access.

adStorageConsent.label: Ad Storage Consent
adStorageConsent.description: Ad Storage Consent for GDPR compliance

sendEvent.title: Send CAPI Event
sendEvent.description: Send a track or page event to Microsoft Bing CAPI.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event being sent to the Bing API.

eventId.label: Event ID
eventId.description: EventID for deduplication. Defaults to the Segment messageId.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: Event action for custom conversion goals, if used.

eventSourceUrl.label: Event Source URL
eventSourceUrl.description: URL of the page, used for example: “destination URL” goals. Required for pageLoad events.

pageLoadId.label: Page Load ID
pageLoadId.description: Page load id that links to 0+ custom events from the same page. Format as a v4 UUID.

referrerUrl.label: Referrer URL
referrerUrl.description: Referrer of the page, used for example: "referral" remarketing lists.

adStorageConsent.label: Ad Storage Consent
adStorageConsent.description: Ad Storage Consent for GDPR compliance

dataProvider.label: Data Provider
dataProvider.description: The source of the event data.

userData.label: User Data
userData.description: A list of user identifiers associated with the event.

clientUserAgent.label: Client User Agent
clientUserAgent.description: User agent string of the client device.

externalId.label: External ID
externalId.description: Authenticated user id (anonymized) if user is logged in. Also used for ID sync

em.label: Email
em.description: Email address of the user. Accepts a clear text or hashed email address. Segment will ensure the email address is hashed before sending to Bing Ads.

ph.label: Phone
ph.description: Phone number of the user. Accepts a clear text or hashed phone number. Segment will ensure the phone number is hashed before sending to Bing Ads.

clientIpAddress.label: Client IP Address
clientIpAddress.description: IP address of the client device.

gaid.label: Google Advertising ID
gaid.description: Google Advertising ID for mobile app tracking.

idfa.label: IDFA
idfa.description: Identifier for Advertisers for iOS devices for mobile app tracking.

customData.label: Custom Data
customData.description: Custom data to be sent to the Bing API. This can include additional properties that are not covered by the standard fields.

eventCategory.label: Event Category
eventCategory.description: The category for custom conversion goals, if used.

eventLabel.label: Event Label
eventLabel.description: The label for custom conversion goals.

eventValue.label: Event Value
eventValue.description: The event value for custom conversion goals.

searchTerm.label: Search Term
searchTerm.description: The query used by the user for a search results page.

transactionId.label: Transaction ID
transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction. Required for purchase events.

value.label: Value
value.description: Revenue value (float) to report variable revenue for goals, if used

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The currency of the event value, in ISO 4217 format.

itemIds.label: Item IDs
itemIds.description: A comma separated list of product IDs, or an array of IDs.

pageType.label: Page Type
pageType.description: The type of page where the event occurred.

ecommTotalValue.label: Ecomm Total Value
ecommTotalValue.description: Total value of the cart of purchase.

items.label: Items
items.description: The list of items associated with the event. Must contain at least one item.

id.label: Item ID
id.description: The unique identifier for the item.

price.label: Item Price
price.description: The price of the item, after discounts.

totalPrice.label: Total Price
totalPrice.description: Total price of the booking, including taxes and fees.

basePrice.label: Base Price
basePrice.description: Price of the booking, not including taxes or fees.

checkInDate.label: Check-In Date
checkInDate.description: The date of check-in for the hotel booking in the format YYYY-MM-DD

checkOutDate.label: Check-Out Date
checkOutDate.description: The date of check-out for the hotel booking in the format YYYY-MM-DD

lengthOfStay.label: Length of Stay
lengthOfStay.description: The number of nights the booking is for. Not required if you specify hct_checkout_date.

partnerHotelId.label: Partner Hotel ID
partnerHotelId.description: The ID of the hotel as provided by the partner.

bookingHref.label: Booking Href
bookingHref.description: Encrypted or obfuscated booking refrence number

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: The max number of events to include in each batch.

msclkidPlugin.title: Microsoft Bing msclkid Browser Plugin
msclkidPlugin.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with the Microsoft Bing msclkid Querystring value
msclkidPlugin.defaultSubscription: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"

presets.name: Microsoft Bing CAPI msclkid Plugin
presets.subscribe: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "group" or type = "page" or type = "alias"

presets.name: Send Custom Event
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event != "Order Completed" and event != "Add to Cart" and event != "Products Searched"
